name: autiq-africa-platform
description: Autiq Africa Dealer & Workshop Platform — monorepo coordinator

scripts.setup: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend && npm run db:generate --prefix backend && npm run db:seed --prefix backend
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "FRONTEND,BACKEND" --prefix-colors "cyan,green" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix backend"
